scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sips:[field0]@[field2] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field0]@[field2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sips:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH User-Agent: Avaya one-X Deskphone 6.4.0.33 (33) AVAYA-SM-6.3.8.0.638018 Avaya CM/R016x.03.0.124.0 AVAYA-SM-6.3.8.0.638018 Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sips:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sips:81001001@[local_ip]> Supported: replaces Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=251511 1313510207 2738 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 2048 RTP/AVP 8 0 120 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20

ACK sips:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tls SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sips:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
